title: Cooling and comfort
climate_fact: Room cooling can become a major share of household electricity in warm months.
livelihood_link: Efficient cooling reduces electricity bills while protecting work productivity during heat stress.
action_prompt: Try one monthly efficiency tweak such as thermostat reset and fan pairing.

title: Commute mix
climate_fact: Shifting some short commutes from private vehicles to public transit lowers transport emissions.
livelihood_link: Lower commute spend can free monthly income for household priorities.
action_prompt: Pilot a mixed-mode week and compare cost and travel time.

title: Water and energy
climate_fact: Water pumping and treatment carry an emissions footprint beyond direct home use.
livelihood_link: Water-smart routines can reduce utility pressure and help communities facing irregular supply.
action_prompt: Track showers and laundry for two weeks to identify high-impact habits.

title: Cooking patterns
climate_fact: Cooking fuel use can be reduced with batch cooking and efficient meal planning.
livelihood_link: Predictable meal plans often lower food waste and improve budget stability.
action_prompt: Plan one low-waste cooking cycle this week.

title: Appliance choices
climate_fact: High-efficiency appliances can flatten long-term electricity growth despite usage increases.
livelihood_link: Lower lifetime energy costs can offset higher upfront purchase prices over time.
action_prompt: Tag your next replacement as efficiency-first and compare annual savings.

title: Diet profile
climate_fact: Diet mix influences carbon intensity over a month.
livelihood_link: Balanced low-waste meal choices can improve nutrition resilience while controlling expense volatility.
action_prompt: Track three meals per day for one week to establish your diet baseline.
